title: The Trial
description:
You join a line of people entering a massive building.

As you pass under a [gold]golden archway[/gold], horns blare, [jitter]confetti explodes[/jitter], and [sine]streamers glide[/sine] down from the ceiling!

"Entrant [blue][101-999][/blue], you are the [green]DECIDER[/green] for today's [gold]Trial[/gold]."

options.title: Reject
options.requires: This option is locked. Attempting to reject leads to a penalty choice.

notes:
This is a [gold]multi-stage event[/gold]. Upon accepting, you randomly encounter one of three trial scenarios:

[gold]**Merchant Trial**[/gold] (1/3 chance)
- [blue]Guilty[/blue]: Add [red]Regret[/red] to your deck, obtain [blue]2[/blue] random relics
- [blue]Innocent[/blue]: Add [red]Shame[/red] to your deck, upgrade [blue]2[/blue] of your cards

[gold]**Noble Trial**[/gold] (1/3 chance)
- [blue]Guilty[/blue]: Heal [green]10[/green] HP
- [blue]Innocent[/blue]: Add [red]Regret[/red] to your deck, obtain [blue]300[/blue] gold

[gold]**Nondescript Trial**[/gold] (1/3 chance)
- [blue]Guilty[/blue]: Add [red]Doubt[/red] to your deck, gain [blue]2[/blue] card rewards
- [blue]Innocent[/blue]: Add [red]Doubt[/red] to your deck, transform [blue]2[/blue] of your cards

Rejecting the initial invitation triggers a punishment scenario where the [gold]Grand Arbiter[/gold] threatens lethal damage. You can either accept the original role or [red]double down and face death[/red].
